audience: Belgian SMEs and retailers planning a new online sales channel or a professional redevelopment of an existing online shop.
primaryDutchSearchIntent: Belgische KMO's helpen bepalen welke inhoud, processen, techniek en begeleiding een professionele webshop nodig heeft.

searchIntent.question: What does professional online shop development require for product data, checkout, payments, fulfilment, SEO and daily management?
searchIntent.geographicContext: Belgian SMEs, particularly in Limburg and Flanders, with cross-border EU considerations where relevant.

longTailKeywords: online shop checkout and payment integration
online shop product data and stock integration
directAnswer: Professional online shop development connects dependable product data, a clear mobile checkout, payment and delivery rules, practical order management, legal information and an SEO-ready technical foundation around the SME's actual sales process.
title: Online shop development for SMEs: from product data to checkout
metaDescription: Planning an online shop for your SME? Understand product data, checkout, payments, logistics, VAT, SEO, media and daily management.
h1: Online shop development for SMEs: from product data to checkout
factsToPreserve: The platform choice depends on the range, data, management team, integrations, markets, budget and desired independence.
Payment rules and transaction costs depend on the external provider.
Legal and tax configuration depends on the business, products, customers and target markets and requires qualified review.
Stock, delivery, returns and integration exception paths are part of the customer promise.
Technical SEO and good Core Web Vitals do not guarantee rankings, traffic or sales.
One-off development costs must be distinguished from hosting, platform, app, transaction, maintenance and support costs.
